feature_tested: Sidebar Reorganization (9 Collapsible Groups) & Integration Hub Panel
summary: Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). All integration endpoints working. Frontend: All 9 sidebar groups present with correct expand/collapse functionality. Dashboard expanded by default, others collapsed. Integration Hub panel fully functional with POS/GL/Email cards and config modal. Analytics BI switcher working.

verified_elements: All 9 sidebar groups present with data-testid attributes
DASHBOARD & OVERVIEW expanded by default with 5 items
CULINARY OPERATIONS collapsed, expands to 8 items on click
FINANCIAL & PURCHASING collapsed with chevron
EVENTS & CATERING collapsed with chevron
SPA & WELLNESS collapsed, expands to show Spa Dashboard
ENGINEERING & FACILITIES collapsed, expands to show Engineering Ops, Energy Tracking, My Department
HR & ADMINISTRATION collapsed with chevron
AI & INTEGRATIONS collapsed, expands to show AI³ Intelligence, ZARO Guardian, Integration Hub
COMMUNITY & SUPPORT collapsed with chevron
Chevron icons rotate on expand/collapse
Analytics BI switcher visible and functional
Integration Hub panel opens from AI & Integrations group
Integration Hub shows POS & Financial Integrations section
Toast POS card with CONFIGURED status badge
QuickBooks Online card with CONFIGURED status badge
Email & Communication section with SendGrid and Resend
SendGrid card with CONFIGURED status
Resend card with NOT CONFIGURED status and Configure button
Operations Platforms section with ALICE, Quore, HotSOS (Amadeus), Flexkeeping
Configure modal opens with API Key, Client ID, Client Secret fields
Environment selector (Sandbox/Production) in config modal
Save Configuration button in modal
Cancel button closes modal
Analytics BI panel opens with Today's Performance, Sales charts

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.tsx correctly implements 9 collapsible groups with role-based filtering
NAV_ITEMS structure properly defines all groups with children items
ROLE_SIDEBAR_ACCESS correctly maps roles to allowed groups
pos_gl_oauth.py correctly implements all integration endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar reorganization complete with 9 collapsible groups. Integration Hub panel fully functional. All POS/GL/Email integrations are MOCKED stubs - return 'connection_ready' but don't make actual API calls. Operations platforms (ALICE, Quore, HotSOS, Flexkeeping) are also stubs.

mocked_apis.Toast POS: Stub - returns 'connection_ready' message, no actual API calls
mocked_apis.QuickBooks Online: Stub - returns 'connection_ready' message, no actual API calls
mocked_apis.SendGrid: Stub - queues emails locally, no actual delivery
mocked_apis.Resend: Stub - queues emails locally, no actual delivery
